description: Legal record (#45) in a court register/pinqas from a Karaite beit din in Cairo (on f. 16r of Yevr.-Arab. I 328). Dated on the same day as the previous entry, 19 Tevet, but the exact year is not stated. Shemuʾel b. Yaḥya Fayruz appears before the court in order to release Esther bt. Moshe ha-Levi and her husband ʿAbd al-Karīm (Shemuʾel's brother) from prior debts. The parties agree to not seek any further claims or reimbursement from one another. Although there are slight differences in nomenclature, Shemuʾel b. Yaḥya Fayruz is almost certainly the same person identified in the previous entry as Shemuʾel b. Yaḥya al-Fayruzī (a debt release with one of his other brothers/sisters-in-law). MCD.
description_he: רשומה משפטית (#45) בפנקס בית דין קראי בקהיר (דף 16א של ייבר-ערב. I 328). מתוארך ל-19 בטבת. שמואל בן יחיא פירוז מופיע בפני בית הדין לשחרר את אסתר בת משה הלוי ובעלה עבד אל-כרים (אחיו של שמואל) מחובות קודמים
